title: Creating a Simple News Website Layout

content.problemStatement:
In this practice problem, you'll create a simple recipe website using Flask and Jinja2 template inheritance. Your task is to complete the child templates by extending the base template and overriding the necessary blocks.

### Task
1. Update the child template - `article.html` to do the following
   - Extend the base template
   - Load the page title block in the base template 
   - Load the main content block in the base template 
   When we click on 'Home' - we should get the following


**Note:** the website content in article.html has already been populated. You only need to update the declaration and closing blocks in the child templates
